description: The contract includes a $20,000 allowance for light fixtures. The PM must help the client make selections while staying within this allowance.

nodes.task_description: Provide the client with a list of light fixtures from approved vendors.

expected_outcome.value: A list of options is sent to the client.

nodes.task_description: As the client makes selections, track the total cost against the $20,000 allowance.

expected_outcome.value: A running total of the selected fixtures' cost is maintained.

nodes.task_description: Notify the client when their selections have reached 90% of the allowance to prevent overspending.

expected_outcome.value: A timely notification is sent to the client.
